description: CompositionCotton blend round neck raglan t-shirt, with cross-cut sleevesWash CareHand wash or machine washFittingComfort FitThis black adidas crew neck t-shirt with cross-cut sleeves highlighted with contrasting green stripes, is an ideal wear for men - young and old - alike. short sleeved, it's that perfect polo tee for Sports and fitness training at the neighborhood gym or sports club. Pair it with denims for that casual leisurewear look. It's a great add to the wardrobe of college-goers and working folks.
